title: I want to create a task that lasts 2 days every week

posts.author: islem (Islem)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’m gave a use case that I can’t find how to put it in a monday board.

I want to create a board with employees schedules, some of them are in missions for a long period of times but they work only 2 days per week for that mission.

I don’t know how to create these missions in a monday board, the only solution I found was to create a 2 days task for every week but that’s too much, I want to have only one task that includes a recurrent entry in a timeline where we can see the 2 days per week.
If anyone knows how to do this thank you very much

posts.author: islem (Islem)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello , up
is there someone who can help me with this ?
